prompt:

Asset type: character-free 16:9 background plate for scene 4
Input images: Image 1 is the approved style reference only

Style/medium: handcrafted layered rice-paper collage matching the approved sample; opaque paper flame, no realism
Composition/framing: wide interior with open center for three separate character layers, visible doorway, uncluttered subtitle zone
Lighting/mood: mildly urgent but safe and child-friendly; warm glow against soft indigo shadows
Constraints: no people, no animals, no frightening blaze, no damage, no smoke obscuring the room, no text, no logo, no watermark, no modern objects, no sacred-statue caricature
